YOLO mode is enabled. All tool calls will be automatically approved.
I will now sync the repository by fetching from the origin and rebasing the current branch on top of `origin/main`. This ensures the local worktree is up-to-date with the latest changes.
The rebase failed due to an unstaged file. I will stash the local changes, sync with the remote repository, and then restore my stashed changes to proceed.
